calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Saber Law Group, P.C.S Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendant Convergence Communications, Inc.

Dept. 505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:32:35 a.m. and concluding at 10:06:00 a.m. (D505)

Riley Balestreri, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Saber Law Group, P.C. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Convergence Communications, Inc. not appearing.
Michelle Younkin, witness for the plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's 1st Amended Complaint Filed June 28, 2022.
Proof of substituted service as to Defendant Convergence Communications, Inc. served on July 26, 2022, mailed on August 17, 2022; service effectuated on August 26, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Convergence Communications, Inc. on January 20, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Jason M. Bales, Johanna Bales and Does 1-100 on February 22, 2023.
Proof of service of default judgment prove up hearing served September 20, 2023.

Plaintiff's counsel to summarize the case.
The Court examines counsel regarding facts of the case.
Plaintiff's counsel to provide offer of proof for damages sought.
The Court addresses the witness. Plaintiff's witness provides testimony to the court.
The matter is submitted.

The Court finds that based on the testimony and declarations made, the plaintiff has met its prima facie case and the Court accepts the offer of proof of the totality of the evidence and rules in favor of the Plaintiff Saber Law Group, P.C. and against Defendant Convergence Communications, Inc.

Proposed Judgment to be submitted to the Court for review and approval.
